children.text: The Decision & Effort
children.cn: 决定与努力

children.text: Once there lived an old man called Yu Gong.
children.cn: 从前有一个叫愚公的老人。
children.notes: Once: 从前，一度; called: 被称为，叫
children.statement: 愚公是一个年轻的小伙子。
children.explanation: 句子中明确提到他是一个老人（old man）。
children.keywords: Once, old man, called, Yu Gong

children.text: Two high mountains stopped his family from walking to the other side.
children.cn: 两座大山阻碍了他们家走到另一边。
children.notes: stop... from...: 阻止……做……; walking to: 走到
children.statement: 大山阻止了愚公家人走向大山的另一侧。
children.explanation: 句子表明两座高山阻碍（stopped）了他们家走到另一边（walking to the other side）。

children.text: So Yu Gong decided to move the mountains with his family.
children.cn: 因此愚公决定和家人一起移走这些大山。
children.notes: decided to: 决定做某事; move: 移动，搬走
children.statement: “decided to” 后面应该接动词的过去式形式。
children.explanation: decide to 后面必须接动词原形（此处为 move），表示决定做某事。

children.text: They started digging with their tools.
children.cn: 他们开始用工具挖掘。
children.notes: started digging: 开始挖（start doing）; tools: 工具
children.statement: 这里 “started digging” 意为“开始挖掘”。
children.explanation: start doing sth. 表示开始做某事，digging 是 dig 的动名词形式，表示挖掘。

children.text: The Mockery & Determination
children.cn: 嘲讽与决心

children.text: A man called Zhi Sou laughed at Yu Gong and said it was impossible.
children.cn: 一个叫智叟的人嘲笑愚公，说这是不可能的。
children.notes: laughed at: 嘲笑; impossible: 不可能的
children.explanation: “laugh at” 意为“嘲笑”，而“微笑”通常用 “smile” 表达。

children.text: But Yu Gong did not stop and said his family would keep digging.
children.cn: 但是愚公没有停止，并说他的家人会继续挖下去。
children.notes: did not stop: 没有停止; keep doing: 继续做某事; would: 将要（will的过去式，表过去将来）
children.statement: 愚公听了智叟的嘲笑后立刻放弃了移山。
children.explanation: 句子中说“did not stop”（没有停止），并且表示家人会继续挖掘。

children.text: Finally, a god was moved by Yu Gong and helped him.
children.cn: 最终，一位神仙被愚公感动了，并帮助了他。
children.notes: Finally: 最终; was moved by: 被……感动; god: 神仙
children.explanation: 在这句话中，“was moved by” 意为“被……感动”，而非“被移动”。

children.text: Moral of the Story
children.cn: 故事的寓意

children.text: This story teaches us that we should never give up.
children.cn: 这个故事告诉我们，我们永远不应该放弃。
children.notes: teaches: 教，教导; never: 从不; give up: 放弃
children.explanation: give up 是一个常用短语，表示“放弃（努力、尝试或某种习惯）”。

children.text: Nothing is impossible if we work hard together.
children.cn: 如果我们共同努力，没有什么是不可能的。
children.notes: nothing: 没有什么; impossible: 不可能的; work hard: 努力工作/学习
children.explanation: “impossible” 意为“不可能的”，它的反义词是 “possible”（可能的）。

children.text: The Challenge & Resolution
children.cn: 挑战与决心

children.text: Once upon a time, there lived an old man named Yu Gong, whose family was blocked by two massive mountains.
children.cn: 从前，有一个叫愚公的老人，他的家人被两座巨大的山挡住了去路。
children.notes: Once upon a time: 从前（常用于故事开头）; whose...: 引导非限制性定语从句，修饰 Yu Gong; blocked: 阻挡; massive: 巨大的
children.statement: 句子中的 'whose' 引导定语从句，修饰 'Yu Gong' 并作 family 的定语。
children.explanation: whose 引导的定语从句在句中作定语，修饰前面的 Yu Gong，表示“他的（家人）”。
children.keywords: Once upon a time, named, whose, blocked, mountains

children.text: Although the task seemed extremely difficult, he resolved to remove the mountains with the help of his family.
children.cn: 尽管这个任务看起来极其困难，但他还是下定决心在全家人的帮助下把山移走。
children.notes: Although: 尽管; resolved to do: 下定决心做某事; remove: 移走; with the help of: 在……的帮助下
children.statement: “resolved to” 意为“下定决心做某事”，此处为过去式形式。
children.explanation: resolve to do sth. 意为“决定/下定决心做某事”，过去式为 resolved to do。
children.keywords: Although, task, extremely, resolved, remove, help

children.text: They immediately began digging up the rocks and carrying them away day after day.
children.cn: 他们立即开始挖掘岩石并日复一日地把它们运走。
children.notes: immediately: 立即; began doing: 开始做某事; digging up: 挖出; day after day: 日复一日
children.statement: “day after day” 表示动作的连续和坚持，意为“日复一日”。
children.explanation: day after day 是固定短语，表示“日复一日地”，强调每天都在重复同样的动作，体现坚持不懈。
children.keywords: immediately, began, digging, carrying, day after day

children.text: The Mockery & Persistent Faith
children.cn: 嘲笑与坚守信念

children.text: A man named Zhi Sou mocked Yu Gong, claiming that it was completely impossible to succeed.
children.cn: 一个名叫智叟的人嘲笑愚公，声称取得成功是完全不可能的。
children.notes: mocked: 嘲笑（mock的过去式）; claiming that: 声称（分词作伴随状语）; succeed: 成功
children.statement: “mocked” 相当于 “laughed at”，在此处意为“嘲笑”。
children.explanation: mock 意为“嘲笑、戏弄”，在这里与 laughed at 语义一致，比 laugh at 更加生动。
children.keywords: named, mocked, claiming, completely, impossible, succeed

children.text: However, Yu Gong argued that his descendants would continue their efforts even after he passed away.
children.cn: 然而，愚公争辩说，即使在他去世后，他的子孙后代也会继续努力。
children.notes: However: 然而; descendants: 后代，子孙; passed away: 去世（die的委婉说法）
children.statement: “passed away” 是 “去世” 的委婉表达。
children.explanation: pass away 意为“去世、逝世”，是英语中避免直接说 die 的一种委婉礼貌的表达方式。
children.keywords: However, argued, descendants, continue, passed away

children.text: Deeply moved by his determination, a god eventually sent two deities to carry the mountains away.
children.cn: 一位神仙被他的决心深深打动，最终派了两位神灵把大山移走了。
children.notes: Deeply moved by: 过去分词短语作原因状语; determination: 决心; deities: 神灵（deity的复数形式）
children.statement: “Deeply moved by...” 是过去分词短语作状语，修饰主句主语 “a god”。
children.explanation: 过去分词短语 Deeply moved by his determination 作原因状语，逻辑主语是主句的主语 a god。
children.keywords: Deeply moved, determination, eventually, deities, carry away

children.text: Moral Interpretation
children.cn: 寓意解读

children.text: This inspirational story teaches us that we should never lose heart when facing difficulties.
children.cn: 这个鼓舞人心的故事告诉我们，面对困难时，我们永远不应该灰心丧气。
children.notes: inspirational: 鼓舞人心的; lose heart: 灰心，丧气; when facing: 面对……时（分词作状语）
children.explanation: lose heart 是固定短语，意为“灰心丧气”或“失去信心”，并不是字面上的失去心脏。
children.keywords: inspirational, teaches, lose heart, facing, difficulties

children.text: As long as we persevere and work hard, nothing is truly impossible.
children.cn: 只要我们坚持不懈并努力奋斗，就没有什么事情是真正不可能的。
children.notes: As long as: 只要，引导条件状语从句; persevere: 坚持，锲而不舍; truly: 真正地
children.statement: “As long as” 在这里引导的是时间状语从句。
children.explanation: “As long as” 在这里引导条件状语从句，表示“只要……”，说明完成某事必须具备的条件。
children.keywords: As long as, persevere, work hard, truly, impossible
